response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly accomplished Staff Software Engineer with extensive experience in distributed systems, Node.js, and TypeScript, he lacks the core C++ expertise required for this role. His resume shows only a brief six-month stint using C++ in 2014, which falls significantly short of the deep C++, STL, and low-level multi-threading requirements. Furthermore, he lacks experience in industrial automation, IoT protocols like MQTT, and the specific IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards mandated by the job description.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience with deep expertise in designing scalable distributed systems and microservices.
Strong proficiency in advantageous technologies requested in the job description, including Node.js, React, and cloud infrastructure.
Proven track record of mentoring, applying Agile/TDD practices, and driving software craftsmanship across teams.
concerns: Severe lack of recent and substantial C++ and STL programming experience, which is the core technical requirement.
No demonstrated background in industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or formal Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) practices.
Missing experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA) and MQTT-based IoT message brokers.
